meaning: adj.无气味的 无香味的
examples: This cream is also unscented and has been clinically tested and proven to be hypoallergenic.
The removal of all artificial scents is a must! Use only the highest quality oils and unscented beeswax candles.
Cats dislike strong odors (even air freshener), so use uncovered boxes and unscented litter and scoop out each box every day.
In the dining room, she uses either scented candles designed to complement the aroma of the food, or unscented ones.
